collections.name: User Management
collections.description: All flows related to user authentication, registration, and session lifecycle.

normal: Valid registration with email, password, and username

points.name: Login Handler Entry
points.description: Entry point of the login HTTP handler; receives and parses the login request body.

points.name: Authentication Check
points.description: Cross-module boundary between the handler and the authentication service; validates credentials against the user store.

points.name: Session Creation
points.description: State mutation where a new session token is generated and persisted after successful authentication.

points.name: Login Flow Complete
points.description: Final response step of the login flow; returns session token to the client or writes the error response.

points.name: Register Handler Entry
points.description: Entry point of the registration HTTP handler; receives and parses the registration request body.

points.name: Input Validation
points.description: Cross-module boundary to the validator; checks email format, password strength, and required fields.

points.name: User Record Creation
points.description: State mutation where the new user record is inserted into the database.

points.name: Registration Flow Complete
points.description: Final response step of the registration flow; returns success confirmation or validation error details.

points.name: Authentication Error Handler
points.description: Centralized error handler for authentication failures; logs the error and returns the appropriate HTTP status code.
